characters.name: Abbey
characters.description: AbbeyGenderFemaleAge20 or 19Resides inNew YorkOccupationActressFriendsJessie(formerly)Ravi(formerly)BrandoEnemiesJessie PrescottRavi RossFirst seenActing With the FrenemyLast seenActing With the FrenemyPortrayed byJillian Rose Reed Abby was a friend toJessieuntil she became an antagonist, by stealing Jessie's idea for a role that they were both auditioning for. She askedRavito do her a favor so that she can get the role. Later, neither Abbey nor Jessie ended up getting the role. She has a chameleon named Brando. Abbey is portrayed by Jillian Rose Reed. She's shown to be very deceitful, pretending to be Jessie's friend at first. Abbey even made a pact with Jessie that they both won't let their career get in the way of their friendship. She has no problem admitting that she's two-faced, after betraying Jessie.
characters.personality_section: She's shown to be very deceitful, pretending to be Jessie's friend at first. Abbey even made a pact with Jessie that they both won't let their career get in the way of their friendship. She has no problem admitting that she's two-faced, after betraying Jessie.

characters.name: Abigail
characters.description: AbigailFull nameAbigailNickname(s)The Ghost (Zuri)GenderFemaleAgeCurrently 107 years old, died at 13.Resides inNew York CityOccupationGhostEye colorBrownHair colorBlackFamilyUnknown MotherUnknown FatherRomancesNoneFriendsNoneEnemiesJessie Prescott, Emma Ross, Luke Ross, Ravi Ross, Zuri Ross, Bertram WinkleSchoolNoneAffiliationsGhostFirst seenThe Ghostest With the MostestLast seenThe Ghostest With the MostestPortrayed byJordan Oschman Unknown Father Abigail is a fake myth created byStuart Wootento scare the Ross kids andJessie Prescottto attend his spooky Halloween party. It turns out Abigail is real, and not a myth. She takes candy fromBertramand his security footage saw her face, pale and shrunken. Abigail would reveal her face and smile at the camera. Upon seeing her, Jessie, the Ross kids, and Stuart panicked before running away.

characters.name: Abigail
characters.description: AbigailFull nameAbigailNickname(s)The Ghost (Zuri)GenderFemaleAgeCurrently 107 years old, died at 13.Resides inNew York CityOccupationGhostEye colorBrownHair colorBlackFamilyUnknown MotherUnknown FatherRomancesNoneFriendsNoneEnemiesJessie Prescott, Emma Ross, Luke Ross, Ravi Ross, Zuri Ross, Bertram WinkleSchoolNoneAffiliationsGhostFirst seenThe Ghostest With the MostestLast seenThe Ghostest With the MostestPortrayed byJordan Oschman Unknown Father Abigail is a fake myth created byStuart Wootento scare the Ross kids andJessie Prescottto attend his spooky Halloween party. It turns out Abigail is real, and not a myth. She takes candy fromBertramand his security footage saw her face, pale and shrunken. Abigail would reveal her face and smile at the camera. Upon seeing her, Jessie, the Ross kids, and Stuart panicked before running away.

characters.name: Agatha
characters.description: AgathaNickname(s)Hagatha (byJessie)Evil Agatha (byJessie)GenderFemaleResides inNew YorkOccupationNannyEye colorBrownHair colorBrownFamilyAngela(twin sister)RomancesOfficer PeteyFriendsAxelLindseyJessieOfficer Petey(former crush)RaviZuriEnemiesJessie(formerly)EmmaLukeRavi(formerly)Zuri(formerly)BertramFirst seenWorld Wide Web of LiesLast seenPain in the Rear WindowPortrayed byJennifer Veal Agathais the wicked nanny who bullied Jessie and Zuri in the episodeWorld Wide Web of Liesand is the secondary antagonist of the show. She ran a blog calledToddler Tattler,where she posted out of context pictures that made Jessie and other nannies look like they were very bad at their jobs. However, Jessie and Christina Ross blackmailed her into taking it down. Agatha is similar looking to Nanny McPhee from the film franchise,Nanny McPhee,but their personalities are completely different. She’s portrayed byJennifer Veal. Agatha has brown hair in a tight bun, mint green eyes and two moles, one on her nose and the other on her right chin. Her outfit is a dark blue suit jacket with a matching knee-length skirt and brown leather slip-on shoes with white tights normally worn with a blue and dark blue tartan patterned scarf.

characters.name: Alexia
characters.description: AlexiaFull nameAlexiaNickname(s)AlexGenderFemaleHair colorBlonde/BrownFamilyEric Booth(cousin)First seenThe Telltale DuckLast seenThe Telltale DuckPortrayed byLauren Benz Phillips Alexia isEric Booth's cousin, who pretended to be his girlfriend inThe Telltale Duck. Bertram first sees a picture of her and Eric Booth on the reunion page, calling her "stunning". Despite her looks, she's not intelligent. When Jessie asked Alexia how long she's known Eric, Alexia says "counting's hard".

characters.name: Ally Dawson
characters.description: Ally DawsonFull nameAlly Edgar Dawson (birth name)Ally Edgar Moon (married name)Nickname(s)Ally-Gator (by Miss Suzy)Allly (by Billl)Bird Girl (by Mindy)AllyCat88 (username on MyTewb)Hawk-Eye Dawson (by herself)Ally D (by herself)Goose Pickle (by Austin)Lady (by Austin)Wicked Kitty (by Val)Roxy Rocket (alias in Austin & Alias)Sweetie (by Dez)GenderFemaleAge18 (32-33, as of Austin and Ally Series Finale)Resides in187, Lane Road, Miami, Florida (former; 1998-2016)14b Miami Road, Miami, Florida (current; 2016-Present)OccupationSingerSongwriterSales girlStudentCloudwatcherHead of Mall AssociationA&A Music Factory Co-OwnerMotherEye colorBrownHair colorBrown (Season 1)Chestnut with amber highlights (Season 2)Medium brown with caramel highlights (Season 3-present)FamilyLester Dawson (father)Penny Dawson (mother)Aunt SallyOwen (pet-bird)Grandmother TaylorGrandmother RachelAustin Moon(husband)Mimi Moon (mother-in-law)Mike Moon (father-in-law)Ava Moon (daughter)Alex Moon (son)RomancesAustin Moon (husband)Dallas (former crush)Ethan (former crush)Eliot (former crush)Gavin Young (ex-boyfriend)FriendsAustin Moon (Best-Friend, Husband)Trish De La Rosa (Best-Friend)Dez Wade (Best-Friend)ElliotKira StarrPiperCarrieEnemiesJessie PrescottBrookeTrentTilly ThompsonSchoolMarino High SchoolAffiliationsTeam Austin and AllyAustin and Ally Music FactorySonic BoomRamone RecordsFirst seenAustin & Jessie & Ally: All Star New YearLast seenAustin & Jessie & Ally: All Star New YearPortrayed byLaura Marano Ally Edgar Dawson(born November 29, 1996, age 18; 32-33 in future) is one of two main protagonists of Disney Channel series, Austin and Ally, and on of the main characters, of Austin, Jessie & Ally All Star New Year! Ally is a shy songwriter, who previously had stage-fright meaning she could not sing in front of crowds, and when she was at the age of 5, she had to sing at a Christmas play in Kindergarten, and wetted her pants, causing embarrassment for her. Dawson conquered her stage-fright in Series 2, of A&A, with her best friend and husband, Austin Moon due to him helping her see the bright of things. Austin, in the past, had stolen the song she wrote, ''Double Take'' and had stated he had written it, causing him to be famous. Ally got a slice of his fame at ended up on a talk show, but destroyed everything by accident and threw up on the host. But over the four seasons of Austin and Ally, she has become stronger. She is best friends with Austin Moon (husband), Dez Wade and Trish De La Rosa. Dawson is also the daughter of both Penny and Lester Dawson who are divorced. Her father owns Sonic Boom, a famous music shop in the series where she and her friends normally hang out in. In the far future (September 4, 2020) she gets married to Austin Moon and gives birth to her two kids, Alex and Ava Moon, making her the daughter-in-law of both Mimi and Mike Moon. Her married name is Ally Edgar Moon (nee, Dawson) Ally is a shy, smart and friendly girl who can be awkward around people a
characters.personality_section: Ally is a shy, smart and friendly girl who can be awkward around people at certain times. She can be very over-protective of certain things (i.e, her work, songs) bringing in her serious side. Dawson tries to show people she's strong and is able to take care of herself showing her 'tough' side. She can be also very emotional when seeing a sad movie and would do anything for her friends. But if her friends let her down, Ally can stand at her own guard and refuses to be 'BFF'S' with them anymore.

She can be very over-protective of certain things (i.e, her work, songs) bringing in her serious side. characters.name: Amanda Falkenberg
characters.description: Amanda FalkenbergisZuri'steacher atWalden Academy. She teaches 3rd grade, at first she doesn't like Zuri because Zuri makes impolite comments about her and her teaching. Zuri describes her as "the meanest teacher in the world" andJessiedescribes her as "not good with kids or adults", as even the class gerbil was spelling "help me" in food pellets. She does not like Jessie either and calls her "Miss Purkey Pants". But later Jessie lies to her about liking quidditch and Ms. Falkenberg becomes nice and calls Zuri her "star student", but she also becomes "a level 6 clinger" and invites Jessie to play quidditch with her, but she doesn't want to keep being her friend so she pretends to like quidditch. The next day she tries to confess she does not want to be friends, but Falkenberg tells her she is bad at quidditch and is going to play with Mr. Eitzel because Zuri set them up so Jessie wouldn't have to suffer. She was portrayed byCheri Oteri.

characters.name: Angela
characters.description: AngelaFull nameAngela EllestoyeGenderFemaleOccupationNannyFamilyAgatha(twin sister)FriendsJessie Prescott(formerly)Emma Ross(formerly)Luke Ross(formerly)Ravi Ross(formerly)Zuri Ross(formerly)Bertram Winkle(formerly)EnemiesAgathaJessie PrescottRavi RossZuri RossLuke RossEmma RossBertram WinkleAffiliationsNew YorkFirst seenEvil Times TwoLast seenEvil Times TwoPortrayed byJennifer Veal Emma Ross(formerly)Luke Ross(formerly)Ravi Ross(formerly)Zuri Ross(formerly)Bertram Winkle(formerly) Jessie PrescottRavi RossZuri RossLuke RossEmma RossBertram Winkle Agatha, like most sisters, thinks Angela is evil. This is later revealed to be true when she ingratiates her way into the Ross' family by her friendliness and looks to try to win over the Ross siblings and stealJessie'sjob, causingThe Ross Familyto ditch Jessie. In the end, her plan is ruined, and she leaves the Ross family alone after the kids choose Jessie to be their nanny. She is portrayed by actress Jennifer Veal. She originated from England. She got Agatha sacked from her job as a nanny for Lord Taylor.

characters.name: Austin Moon
characters.description: Austin MoonFull nameAustin Mónica MoonGenderMaleAge15 (Season 1)16 (Season 2)17 (Season 3)19 (Season 4)33 (Series finale)Resides inMiami, FloridaOccupationSingerEye colorBrownHair colorDirty blondFamilyMrs. MoonMr. MoonAlly Dawson(wife)First seenAustin & Jessie & Ally: All Star New YearLast seenAustin & Jessie & Ally: All Star New YearPortrayed byRoss Lynch 16 (Season 2)17 (Season 3)19 (Season 4)33 (Series finale) Ally Dawson(wife) Austin is a carefree teenager who loves music and loves to have fun. He is not quite fond of following rules and will often break them if it means having fun. Austin isn't the brightest in the bunch, and he can sometimes be a slightly massive air-head, also like Dez Wade, he can be very immature, like laughing at fart sounds or childish things. However, through everything he does, Austin always has good intentions and is a very caring person. Austin cares a lot for his friends and is very loyal to them. He also has a very sweet and kind heart and is very respectful to the people he encounters. Despite his kindness and loyalty, he has trouble expressing his emotions and can be very indecisive about things. Additionally, Austin has a tendency to get jealous when others get what he wants.

characters.name: Axel
characters.description: Axel Eden William HurstenbachGenderMaleAgeAbout Zuri's ageResides inNew YorkFamilyLindsay(sister)Peter(brother)FriendsAgatha(Nanny)EnemiesZuriJessieFirst seenWorld Wide Web of LiesLast seenWorld Wide Web of LiesPortrayed byMax Charles Axelis a kid whose babysitter isAgatha. He is around Zuri's age and first/only appears inWorld Wide Web of Lies. He is a spoiled child and thinks he rules Central Park. He was portrayed by Max Charles. Axel is fair-skinned with blonde hair with his bangs combed to the right, brown eyes, and he wears a blue and white long-sleeved shirt with a dress shirt collar underneath a dark blue vest with red and white stripes on the v-neck. He also wears a yellow-and-black stripped neck tie on his neck, dark gray dress pants, and black dress shoes. Axel is fair-skinned with blonde hair with his bangs combed to the right, brown eyes, and he wears a blue and white long-sleeved shirt with a dress shirt collar underneath a dark blue vest with red and white stripes on the v-neck. He also wears a yellow-and-black stripped neck tie on his neck, dark gray dress pants, and black dress shoes. Axel is a very snobby, spoiled brat. He does not like to share and can be mean to others to get what he wants. He is very demanding towards Agatha and thinks he rules Central Park, such has sitting on the slide to read a book so no one can use it. Axel may be showcased to grew up in a rich or wealthy family, if his parents are billionaires or millionaires.

characters.name: Bailey Pickett
characters.description: Bailey PickettFull nameBailey Marie PickettNickname(s)BaileyBunnyLittle HaybailBailey PickleCowboy GirlGenderFemaleAgeSeason 1- 15-16Season 2- 16-17Season 3- 17-1824 (currently)Resides inKansas, Kettlecorn (Hometown)Room 8•302,S.S. TiptonEye colorHazelHair colorBrownFamilyMadeline Pickett (older sister)Bridget Pickett (older sister)Cora Pickett (older sister)Holly Pickett (older sister)Addalynn Pickett (older sister)Zoey Pickett (younger sister)Layla Pickett (younger sister)Allison Pickett (younger sister)Eunice Pickett (mother)Clyde Pickett (father)RomancesMoose (Ex-Boyfriend)Cody Martin (Boyfriend/Future Husband)FriendsZackMayaLondonCodyWoodyMaddieMarcusSchoolSeven Seas HighFirst seenThe Suite Life Sets SailLast seenGraduation On DeckPortrayed byDebby Ryan Bailey Pickett(Debby Ryan) is one of the main characters ofThe Suite Life on Deck. Bailey Pickett was born on her farm in Kettlecorn, Kansas. She is the seventh oldest of ten girls and didn't want to just be a farmer's wife. Before arriving on the S.S. Tipton, she dated Moose, but was heartbroken when they broke up. After living in a small town for so long, Bailey decided to follow her dreams and explore the world. She joined the S.S. Tipton, where she would experience several new adventures with plenty of new people, including Cody Martin, who later became her second boyfriend. She is very close to the country lifestyle. She is described as nice, smart, fun and loving. Bailey is always looking out for other people's feelings, which shows how sensitive she is. She is a sweet, down-to-earth girl who also has a romantic side to her personality. She adores her boyfriend Cody. Though she fell in love with Cody's sensitive, smart personality, in "The Line of Duty", Cody says they will have to meet after curfew due to lack of quality time, and she says she likes the bad boy Cody. Bailey is really helpful and she always finishes her homework on time and has never missed a day of school as shown in "Senior Ditch Day". She is persistent, as seen in "Smarticle Particles" when she never gave up trying to tutor London.

characters.name: Bertram Winkle
characters.description: Bertram WinkleFull nameBertram WinkleNickname(s)Bertootchka(By Wanda Winkle)Bertie(By Rhoda Chesterfield)Stinkle(by Eric Booth)GenderMaleAge49(Season 1)50(Season 2)51(Season 3)52(Season 4)61(Currently)Resides inNew York CityOccupationButlerEye colorBlueHair colorBaldFamilyWanda Winkle(mother)Grace(aunt)Shirley(aunt)Unnamed(grandmother)RomancesSalma Espinosa(crush and girlfriend)Karen Holtzhauer(former crush)Rhoda Chesterfield(crush on her side)FriendsJessie Prescott(best friends; co-worker)Emma Ross(good friend)Ravi Ross(his most favorite kid)Zuri Ross(one of his favorite kids)Luke Ross(frenemies)BoomerSerena(deceased)Gladys the GiraffeEnemiesAgathaAngelaWendy McMillanRhoda ChesterfieldThe Ross Family(sometimes)Eric BoothNigel Pettigrew(arch-rival)Phil McNicholAbigailCorinne BaxterDr. Cyrus Van AdamsMadelineRoger BevansScottAffiliationsRoss PenthouseFirst seenNew York, New NannyLast seenJessie Goes to HollywoodPortrayed byKevin Chamberlin  Bertram Winkleis one of the main characters inJESSIE. He is the Ross family’s butler, and he is the son ofWanda Winkle. He’s usually miserable about his job and the kids. He dislikes Luke the most out of the four children. But in his heart, he loves them all and comes to love and support them in the end. Bertram was portrayed byKevin Chamberlin. Bertram is the Ross family's lazy and grouchy butler, who seems to care very little for the kids and calls them "The Nanny Killers". Even though he rarely shows it, he does have a soft side for them. He seems to like Jessie sometimes, though he sometimes gives her advice, not knowing his intentions and mistakes where she is from. Bertram often takes time for himself and wishes he could quit his job, but quit once, then came back. He spends his time cleaning, reading magazines on the couch, watching TV in the screening room, taking naps and eating bacon-wrapped donuts. The Ross kids insult him sometimes when he tries to help them. When the father is home he pays extra attention to his job. But not so much when the mom is at home.

characters.name: Bertram-bots
characters.description: Bertram-botsFull nameBertram-BotsGenderGenderlessOccupationFuture Bertram's MinionsEye colorProbably the same as BertramHair colorBaldFirst seenThe Jessie-nator: Grudgement DayLast seenThe Jessie-nator: Grudgement DayPortrayed byKevin ChamberlinThe Bertram-Bots are robots designed byRaviin an alternate future to help Bertram with his chores. However, he turns them into his personal minions to help him take over the world. The Bertram-Bots have a silver and black body with three antennas. Underneath their helmets, their faces look exactly like Bertram's. As the leader of the Resistance, the Bertram-Bots were given the priority to get rid of her.

characters.name: Brett Summers
characters.description: Brett Summersis a football jock at Walden Academy and Emma's love interest in the episode "Somebunny's in Trouble". He was portrayed byJack Griffo. In "Somebunny's in Trouble",Emmahad a crush on him. She hadLukehelp her learn about sports so Brett would like her. When Emma found a phone number in his jacket, she thought Brett was cheating on her, but he was actually hanging out with Luke. When Emma found out, she was upset. So Luke sacrificed him and Brett's friendship for Emma's happiness. To return the favor, Emma broke up with him. But after a disagreement on sports teams, Luke and Brett's friendship ended.

characters.name: Brody Winton
characters.description: Brody WintonGenderMaleAge20-25Resides inNew YorkFamilyGrandmaRomancesJessie Prescott(ex-girlfriend)Caitlin (possible ex-girlfriend)EnemiesTonyJessie PrescottEmma RossLuke RossRavi RossZuri RossBertram WinkleFirst seenThe Princess and the Pea BrainLast seenThe Princess and the Pea BrainPortrayed byBen Bledsoe Jessie PrescottEmma RossLuke RossRavi RossZuri RossBertram Winkle Brody Wintonis a guest star inThe Princess and the Pea Brain. He askedJessieout on a date, her not knowing that he already has a girlfriend named Caitlin, and that he's a jerk to the others. Jessie eventually discovers his true intentions, and, stands up against him.Zurihated him from the first time she saw him. She could tell that something was wrong with him, and that Jessie was not suitable for him. He also owns a motorcycle. He was portrayed byBen Bledsoe.

characters.name: Bryn Breitbart
characters.description: Bryn BreitbartGenderFemaleResides inNew YorkOccupationStudentFamilyAl Breitbart (father)EnemiesEmma RossJessie PrescottRosieLuke RossRavi RossMs. DevlinSchoolWalden AcademyFirst seenKids Don't Wanna Be ShunnedLast seenDiary of a Mad NewswomanPortrayed byKatherine McNamara Bryn Breitbartis a snobby, mean girl who attends Walden High School and is an enemy ofEmma Ross. She, at first, lied to everyone by saying she was a member of theDanish Royal Familyand that she was thirteenth in line for the throne, but it was eventually revealed that she lied and, in reality, her family makes toilet paper. She turned all of Emma's friends against her in the episodeKids Don't Wanna Be Shunned. In the end, she throws a nacho at Rosie, aimed for Emma, and causesRosieto "die" (actually fall). She is portrayed byKatherine McNamara. Bryn and Emma

characters.name: Bunny-Bot 3000
characters.description: Bunny-Bot 3000Full nameBunny-Bot 3000First seenToy ConLast seenToy Con Bunny-Bot 3000is a toy that Zuri wanted instead of Jessie's original Military Mary doll that Jessie's dad gave to her. Jessie then gave it to Zuri. Simon Sneed owned a Bunny-Bot 3000 which he was selling at his Rare and Vintage Toys stand, and he was interested in the Military Mary doll. So, Zuri and Simon made an unfair trade, since Zuri didn't know of Military Mary's real value. Zuri and Ravi attempted to ask Simon Sneed to trade back Bunny-Bot 3000 for Military Mary but failed with Simon refusing. They went to the Toy-Tacular dressed up in costumes as the children band,The Snugglebugs, members to get back Military Mary from Simon Sneed's auction and give Simon back Bunny-Bot 3000. They succeeded with Simon Sneed being chased by the people who attended Toy-Tacular, but it's still unknown if they still traded them back, as it seems as if they only got Military Mary and didn't give him back Bunny-Bot 3000. Some of the features the Bunny-Bot 3000 had were to say slogans and "poop" out Swiss chocolate with almonds. Although it can "poop" out Swiss chocolate with almonds, it can run out, and if you wish to keep on using it, you'd have to buy chocolate and refill it yourself. One of the slogans it would say is, "You're the best boy or girl ever! Tell your mommy to buy my DVDs, backpacks and lunchboxes!"
